name: Cartographer Spells
description:
When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Cartographer Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

Cartographer Spells:
- 3rd level: Faerie Fire, Guiding Bolt, Healing Word
- 5th level: Locate Object, Mind Spike
- 9th level: Call Lightning, Clairvoyance
- 13th level: Banishment, Locate Creature
- 17th level: Scrying, Teleportation Circle
